definitions.text: The colour of the setting sun, blood, and strawberries; the colour which is evoked by the longest visible wavelengths (between about 625–740 nm), and a primary additive colour.
examples: Red can be seen as hot or angry.

definitions.text: A revolutionary socialist or (most commonly) a Communist; a Bolshevik, a supporter of the Bolsheviks in the Russian Civil War.

examples: The girl wore a red skirt.
He was wearing a red jacket.

definitions.text: Having an orange-brown or orange-blond colour; ginger.
Having a redder hue than usual due to embarrassment, anger, sunburn, etc.; flushed.
Used to indicate that the speaker wishes current sexual activity to stop immediately.
simple past and past participle of rede
